---
title: "Courses"
description-meta: "Course materials from Connor L. Brown, including an Introduction to R for Field Ecology."
open-graph:
  description: "Course materials from Connor L. Brown, including an Introduction to R for Field Ecology."
twitter-card:
  description: "Course materials from Connor L. Brown, including an Introduction to R for Field Ecology."
editor: visual
toc: true
number-sections: false
---

## Field Ecology

- [Intro to R](courses/field_ecology/intro2r/Intro2RPres.qmd)
